cost_controls.note: These are policy ceilings, not a price quotation. Promotion requires a reviewed cost estimate and cleanup evidence.

required_preflight_gates: exact target and planner evidence identity match
evidence mount resolves to the managed evidence disk
NIC subnet and static address recorded
current identity and visible role assignments recorded
current OS-disk identity, size, OS type, Hyper-V generation, security type, encryption, and access policy recorded
recovery owner, cost ceiling, and cleanup deadline approved

phases.evidence_required: authorization package, reviewed commit, exact target, unexpired approval
service, health, mount, filesystem, evidence readability, VM, NIC, disks, identity, RBAC, and OS-disk recreation metadata
NIC and evidence disk verified Detach before VM deletion; OS disk remains disposable only after its snapshot is independently verified
evidence-disk snapshot and OS-disk snapshot for canonical-name recreation
provisioning state, source identity, size, generation, access policy, expiry tags, and deterministic canonical-name OS-disk recreation contract
VM-only deletion after both snapshots are verified, with NIC and evidence disk preserved and canonical OS-disk name expected to become reusable
NIC, static address, subnet, evidence disk, both recovery snapshots, and canonical OS-disk name availability
Ubuntu 24.04 VM using preserved NIC and evidence disk with canonical OS-disk name
public network access Disabled and network access policy DenyAll
new principal recorded and approved role assignments recreated
cloud-init, mount UUID, service, health, durable write, restart persistence, identity and RBAC
independent evidence, operations, security, and cost decisions
acceptance decision, exact cleanup confirmation, deletion proof before deadline

rollback.decision: Create and independently verify an OS-disk snapshot, allow the disposable old OS disk to be deleted with the old VM, retain the canonical OS-disk name for the replacement, and recreate the prior bootable VM from the verified snapshot if rollback is required.
source_preflight_required: security type and Trusted Launch compatibility
snapshot_verification_required: Hyper-V generation and OS type are preserved
execution, owner, and cleanup-deadline tags are present
cleanup deadline is no more than 24 hours after creation

recreation_contract.identity_rule: record the new system-assigned principal and restore only the approved RBAC allowlist
acceptance_required: prior OS boots under the reviewed security profile
same evidence filesystem UUID is mounted at /var/lib/servicetracer
collector service and local health endpoint succeed
durable write and restart persistence succeed
NIC, static address, identity, RBAC, and disk access policies match the rollback contract

rollback.before_old_vm_deletion: Abort without deleting old compute unless both evidence-disk and OS-disk recovery snapshots are independently verified.
rollback.after_old_vm_deletion: If replacement verification fails, remove only the failed replacement compute boundary, recreate the canonical OS disk from the verified OS snapshot, recreate the prior VM with the preserved NIC and evidence disk, restore approved RBAC, and verify the rollback acceptance checks.
rollback.evidence_disk_rule: Never discard, format, replace, or restore over the evidence disk during rollback.

unresolved_blockers: operational proof of the selected OS-disk snapshot recreation rollback
reviewed temporary-cost estimate and cleanup owner
independent operations-and-recovery approval of this rollback decision
